title: The Epoch-Stack

features.name: dust-time-indicator
features.desc-on-touch: the years stack here in visible dust layers; you count backwards through the settled particulate of decades, each grain marking when someone entered a room

features.name: corridor-ascending
features.desc-on-touch: the hallway rises through itself; each floor identical, but the light through the windows changes by decade

features.name: room-register
features.desc-on-touch: a ledger frozen mid-entry; the pen here stopped writing in 1987 but the ink is still wet, somehow, in the decades before and after

features.name: time-mirror
features.desc-on-touch: you stand in a mirror and see the room as it was in every year it existed simultaneously; the reflections don't match the room you're standing in now

features.name: key-accumulation
features.desc-on-touch: room keys for all the decades, each one a different weight, hanging here in a glyph that spells nothing in any language

inscription: the rooms never change, but the air inside them ages at different speeds

file.name: Motel_Registry_Layered_1965-2004.txt
file.note: guest names from seventy years compressed into one handwriting; some guests appear to check in before they were born

exits.label: back towards the corridor's single unchanging hour
down into the basement where the motel's year-zero is buried
out into the parking lot where cars from different decades are still arriving
